scripts.optimize-models: gltf-transform optimize public/models/CastleModel.glb public/models/CastleModel.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512 --simplify-ratio 0.5 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/furnace.glb public/models/furnace.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/RobotExpressive.glb public/models/RobotExpressive.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/filecoin_model.glb public/models/filecoin_model.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512
scripts.optimize-models-aggressive: gltf-transform optimize public/models/CastleModel.glb public/models/CastleModel.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 256 --simplify-ratio 0.25 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/furnace.glb public/models/furnace.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/RobotExpressive.glb public/models/RobotExpressive.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512 && gltf-transform optimize public/models/filecoin_model.glb public/models/filecoin_model.glb --compress quantize --texture-compress webp --texture-size 512
scripts.optimize-models-compatible: cp public/models/_original/CastleModel.glb public/models/CastleModel.glb && cp public/models/_original/RobotExpressive.glb public/models/RobotExpressive.glb && cp public/models/_original/filecoin_model.glb public/models/filecoin_model.glb && cp public/models/_original/furnace.glb public/models/furnace.glb && npx gltf-transform optimize public/models/CastleModel.glb public/models/CastleModel.glb --compress false --texture-compress false --texture-size 512 --simplify-ratio 0.5 && npx gltf-transform optimize public/models/furnace.glb public/models/furnace.glb --compress false --texture-compress false --texture-size 512 && npx gltf-transform optimize public/models/RobotExpressive.glb public/models/RobotExpressive.glb --compress false --texture-compress false --texture-size 512 && npx gltf-transform optimize public/models/filecoin_model.glb public/models/filecoin_model.glb --compress false --texture-compress false --texture-size 512
scripts.use-original-models: cp public/models/_original/CastleModel.glb public/models/CastleModel.glb && cp public/models/_original/RobotExpressive.glb public/models/RobotExpressive.glb && cp public/models/_original/filecoin_model.glb public/models/filecoin_model.glb && cp public/models/_original/furnace.glb public/models/furnace.glb
